title: Changing recurring item's due date to current date
excerpt:
Hi there, 
I am setting up some annual recurring items and want to change the starting month of the recurrence as currently it is always starting in January. 
Any clues? TIA.

posts.author: LindsayIsometric (Lindsay Simpson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,
I am setting up some annual recurring items and want to change the starting month of the recurrence as currently it is always starting in January.
Any clues? TIA.

posts.author: lisamayerson (Lisa Mayerson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @LindsayIsometric,

Would the automation, “When an item is created, set [date column] to creation date” work for you? That way whenever your recurring tasks are created, the due date will be set to the day it was created?

Let me know if this would achieve what you’re looking for!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
